title: PVP Patches
description: This plugin fixes pvp releated bugs in Minecraft and paper.
body:
This plugin fixes the following issues:
- When you swing your offhand, it resets your main hand attack cooldown.
- When your ender pearl lands, it should keep your velocity, but it doesn't do so on paper.
- When a wind charge hits an ender pearl, it has like a 10% chance of actually triggering it.
